curation.synopsis: A loyalist strike cruiser of the Imperial Fists has been brought down over a forested moon, and its survivors are running for their lives through trees that have already begun to die. The Death Guard chaplain Murnau hunts them. His brothers are slow but very thorough, and when the chase drags on beyond his patience he reaches for the weapon his Legion is learning not to be ashamed of: a squad of Destroyers, sealed into their armour with the chemical, biological and radiological tools no other Legion will use. By the time Murnau is done, there is no enemy left to find — and not much left of the moon either. A grim, character-tight first portrait of the XIV Legion's appetite for the things their gene-father once forbade.
